title: Solvite Wallpaper Repair Adhesive Tube Ref 1574678
features: Repair quickly – The extra strong wallpaper repair adhesive is ideal for repairing torn wallpaper, lifted edges and overlapping seams quickly and effectively.
Easy to use – The practical wallpaper seam sealer has been created with an ergonomic design, precision nozzle and an easy-spread formula to keep wallpaper repairs simple.
Efficient – The high-strength wallpaper paste repair adhesive is able to seal wallpaper tears, seams and lifted edges to ensure walls are kept looking as good as new.
Extra strong – The wallpaper seam glue is specially designed with an extra-strong formula to ensure long-lasting results and preventing future tears or lifted seams.
Package Contents – Solvite Wallpaper Repair Adhesive, wallpaper adhesive for fixing tears, seams and lifted edges, extra-strong, easy-spread formula, long-lasting results, 1x56g
description: From the manufacturer Since Solvite first entered the market in 1964, it has become the UK's leading provider of wallpaper adhesives for professional decorators and private consumers. In 1973, Solvite became part of the Henkel company and was a great match for Henkel’s adhesive R&D and manufacturing resources. The name Solvite and its iconic advertising stand for effective, powerful adhesives. It is approved and recommended by the Painting and Decorating Association. Solvite Wallpaper Repair Adhesive Effectively repair wallpaper tears, seams & edges in no time The extra-strong wallpaper repair glue is specially designed for repairing torn wallpaper, lifted edges and overlapping seams quickly and effectively. The practical wallpaper seam sealer features a precision nozzle and has an ergonomic design with an easy spread formula to keep wallpaper repairs simple and effective, whilst ensuring walls are kept looking as good as new. Repair tears, lifted edges & overlapping seams Easy-spread formula Extra-strong & long-lasting With a precision nozzle Ergonomic design Format: 1x 56g How to apply Step 1 After moistening the back of the wallpaper with water, apply Sovlite Repair Adhesive to the wall. Step 2 Spread the adhesive evenly on the wall surface using a brush. Step 3 For overlapping seams, spread the adhesive evenly on the bottom piece of wallpaper and press overlapping piece down firmly. Long-lasting results This easy-to-use wallpaper seam glue has been designed with an extra-strong formula. This will ensure long-lasting results and prevent future tears or lifted seams.
